texto: Perhaps the word perfect is just an illusion isn't it ?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Amira -Fadil que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Perhaps the word perfect is just an illusion isn't it ?”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, illusion, perhaps, com foco em reflexao.

texto: In your hearts ,you will always find water and flames ,when the flames get out of control ,you need to give them some water ,it's like you have to find the perfect by balancing the fire and water in your hearts for a honest ,truthful life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Amira -Fadil: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “In your hearts ,you will always find water and flames ,when the flames get out of control ,you ne…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, heart, water pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: There are days where you feel like shit ,torn apart,empty ,like it's hell .Well don't worry ,it does get better this hell of yours is what makes you find your happy path in life again.Why ?because during this hell all your pieces come out together and your task is to put them together and find who you really are.
